questions.question: Choose the antonym of FRUGAL:
questions.explanation: Frugal means economical. Its antonym is Lavish (spending freely).

questions.question: HUMBLE is the antonym of:
questions.explanation: Humble means modest. Arrogant (overly proud) is its antonym.

questions.question: Choose the antonym of EXPLICIT:
questions.explanation: Explicit means clearly stated. Implicit means implied, not stated = antonym.

questions.question: TIMID is opposite to:
questions.explanation: Timid means lacking courage. Bold (brave) is its antonym.

questions.question: Antonym of TEMPORARY:
questions.explanation: Temporary means lasting for a limited time. Permanent = lasting forever = antonym.

questions.question: Choose antonym of LOQUACIOUS:
questions.explanation: Loquacious means talkative. Taciturn means saying little = antonym.

questions.question: CANDID is opposite to:
questions.explanation: Candid means truthful and direct. Insincere = not honest = antonym.
